summary: Jump In Session flow backend testing completed. 15/15 tests passed. Found CRITICAL BUG: Leave session endpoint missing refund logic due to router conflict.

critical.issue: Leave session endpoint in sessions.py (line 702) is being used instead of bookings.py (line 2692) due to router order. The sessions.py endpoint does NOT have the 10-minute refund logic. Frontend expects response.data.refunded and response.data.refund_amount but sessions.py only returns {message: 'Left session successfully'}
critical.fix: Either remove the duplicate endpoint from sessions.py OR move bookings_router before sessions_router in routes/__init__.py

ui_bugs.issue: Login flow redirects to role selection page after entering credentials, preventing access to bookings page for UI testing

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: Remove duplicate leave session endpoint from /app/backend/routes/sessions.py (lines 702-715) OR reorder routers in routes/__init__.py to include bookings_router before sessions_router
Investigate frontend auth issue - login redirects to role selection instead of completing login
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL: Duplicate endpoint /sessions/leave/{session_id} exists in both sessions.py and bookings.py. The sessions.py version (without refund logic) is being used because sessions_router is included before bookings_router in routes/__init__.py
The bookings.py leave endpoint (line 2692) has proper 10-minute refund logic, but it's being shadowed by sessions.py endpoint
Frontend LiveSessionsTab.js correctly expects refund response fields (refunded, refund_amount, new_balance) but backend sessions.py doesn't return them
context_for_next_testing_agent: Jump In Session backend APIs working. CRITICAL: Leave session refund logic not working due to router conflict - sessions.py endpoint shadows bookings.py endpoint. Frontend auth has issues preventing UI testing. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_jump_in_session_flow.py covers join, leave, payment, and pricing endpoints.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Router registration order in /app/backend/routes/__init__.py - sessions_router is included at line 95 before bookings_router at line 112. Both have /sessions/leave/{session_id} endpoint. FastAPI uses first-match routing, so sessions.py endpoint (without refund logic) is always used.
reproduction_steps: 3. This error message is from sessions.py (line 709), not bookings.py which returns 'Session not found or already ended'
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Remove lines 702-715 from /app/backend/routes/sessions.py to let bookings.py endpoint handle leave requests with proper refund logic

features_tested.join_session_endpoint: PASS - validates input, checks photographer shooting status, handles credit/card payment
features_tested.card_payment_checkout: PASS - returns Stripe checkout URL with custom domain checkout.raw.surf
features_tested.get_user_sessions: PASS - returns sessions with photographer_username for @username display
features_tested.leave_session_endpoint: FAIL - missing refund logic (uses wrong endpoint)
features_tested.duplicate_join_prevention: PASS - returns 400 if already in session
